name: Under the Sea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve Jell-O in boiling water.
2. Add pear juice, salt, and vinegar.
3. Pour mixture into a loaf pan and chill until firm.
4. Chill remaining Jell-O until cold and syrupy. Place in bowl of cracked ice and whip until fluffy like whipped cream.
5. Cream cheese with ginger, fold in gelatin mixture gradually.
6. Fold in pears.
7. Pour over firm first layer.
8. Chill until firm.
9. Unmold on crisp lettuce.
10. Garnish with mayonnaise.
